message:
feat(engine): add structured ImportClause to AST and parser for all ES import forms

AST (ast.rs, +175 lines):
- Add ImportClause enum with 6 variants: SideEffect, Default, Namespace,
  Named, DefaultAndNamed, DefaultAndNamespace covering the full ES module
  import syntax surface
- Add ImportSpecifier struct with imported/local binding names
- ImportDeclaration gains a clause field alongside the existing binding
- Implement canonical_value(), primary_binding(), and binding_names()
  methods on ImportClause for downstream consumption

Parser (parser.rs, +188 lines):
- Implement parse_import_binding_clause() returning structured ImportClause
  instead of Option<String>
- New parse_named_import_specifiers() function parses { foo, bar as baz }
  syntax with duplicate-binding detection
- Add ParserInput impl for ParserSource
- Parser tests updated to assert on clause types

Arena parser (parser_arena.rs):
- Synthesize ImportClause::Default/SideEffect from existing binding field
  during AST reconstruction

Static semantics, harness, and tests:
- Update import_stmt() test helper to construct the new clause field
- estimate_statement_allocation_count now counts all clause.binding_names()
- All 10 integration test files updated to include clause field in
  ImportDeclaration literals

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
